## Question

What are we trying to find out?

## Why This Matters

How will the findings affect architecture, implementation, or prioritization?

## Scope

What should the investigation cover? What is explicitly out of scope?

## Expected Output

- [ ] Findings documented (in this issue or `docs/investigations/`)
- [ ] Recommended next steps
- [ ] Sub-tasks created for implementation work (if applicable)
- [ ] Decisions flagged for human review (if applicable)

## Relevant Context

Links to specs, prior investigations, or external resources.

## Findings

_(Filled in by the agent)_

## Recommendations

_(Filled in by the agent)_
